$comment: Quality gates for the audit-fix waves (v2 executor). Bash hooks assume a bash-capable hook shell. Portable Node lives at ~/node-win (not on PATH), so commands set PATH explicitly. Note: hooks are loaded at session start — edits mid-session take effect next session.

hooks.command: input=$(cat); printf '%s' "$input" | grep -Eq 'push[[:space:]].*--force|--force-with-lease|rm[[:space:]]+-rf|reset[[:space:]]+--hard' && { echo 'audit-wave guard: destructive command blocked (force-push / rm -rf / reset --hard)' >&2; exit 2; }; exit 0
